latin: Puella verbum novum 'festivum' iterum atque iterum usurpabat. tandem regina gregis eam obiurgavit: 'desine conari efficere ut "festivum" accidat. non accidet!'

questions.prompt: What does the girl keep trying to do?
questions.target: Make a new slang word happen
choices: Make a new slang word happen

questions.target: Stop trying — it's never going to happen
choices: Stop trying — it's never going to happen
She wants to use it too

translation: A girl kept using the new word 'fetch' again and again. Finally the queen of the group scolded her: 'Stop trying to make "fetch" happen. It's not going to happen!'
